The wi_skills agent failed on multiple fronts: (1) it bypassed the mandatory confirmation step, (2) used MAX instead of SUM for quantity merging, (3) failed to detect Variant B-unique materials due to a regex pattern mismatch in the skill script, and (4) produced an incorrect merged BOM count of 15 instead of 17.
